same_budget_manifest.same_backbone: ResNet18_1D shared by SODA-RFF, SourceOnly, and strict baselines
same_budget_manifest.same_source_training: Stage-A source model and source split cache are reused across candidates
same_budget_manifest.same_target_unlabeled_pool: Each candidate consumes the same Z_adapt pool for the protocol/split/fold
same_budget_manifest.source_only_budget_note: SourceOnly has no target-adaptation hyperparameters; it is evaluated once on the same FAR grid.
same_budget_manifest.selection_rule: SODA-aligned FAR grid: mean over FAR points of 0.5*H_KU + 0.5*H_DU, then drift/known/stable/AUC tie-breakers.
